title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at S.R. Batliboi - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at S.R. Batliboi - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
S.R. Batliboi is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About S.R. Batliboi:
S.R. Batliboi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.R. Batliboi!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
